mapper.select: SELECT id, gym_id AS gymId, title, `text`, created_at AS createdAt, view_count AS viewCount FROM GYM_NOTICE WHERE gym_id = #{value} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT id, gym_id, title, `text`, created_at, view_count FROM GYM_NOTICE WHERE gym_id = #{gymId} ORDER BY
view_count DESC
created_at DESC
LIMIT #{start}, #{size}
SELECT id, gym_id, title, `text`, created_at, view_count FROM GYM_NOTICE WHERE id = #{value}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO GYM_NOTICE ( gym_id, title, `text`, view_count, created_at ) VALUES ( #{gymId}, #{title}, #{content}, 0, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id AS imageId, notice_id AS noticeId, image_url AS imageUrl, order_index AS orderIndex FROM IMAGE WHERE notice_id = #{value} ORDER BY order_index ASC
